Context

Nagisa Hazuki is one of the main members of the Iwatobi Swim Club and a childhood friend of Haruka Nanase and Makoto Tachibana.

HeвАЩs the one who reunites everyone and restarts the swim club in Free! Iwatobi Swim Club.

Cheerful and energetic, Nagisa represents the heart and spirit of friendship in the series.

He specializes in breaststroke, where his determination shines.

Biography

Nagisa Hazuki (иСЙжЬИ жЄЪ) grew up in Iwatobi and went to elementary school with Haruka, Makoto, and Rin.

He always admired HarukaвАЩs swimming style and dreamed of swimming together again someday.

At Iwatobi High School, he takes the initiative to re-form the swim club and brings everyone together.

In Eternal Summer and Dive to the Future, Nagisa continues to swim passionately while supporting his friends both emotionally and competitively.
